section.p: Problems with VPN connections often occur due to mismatched configurations between the endpoints.
To confirm that an IPsec connection is established, enter:
section.codeblock: # ipsec trafficstatus 006 #8: "vpn.example.com"[1] 192.0.2.1, type=ESP, add_time=1595296930, inBytes=5999, outBytes=3231, id='@vpn.example.com', lease=198.51.100.1/32
section.p: For a successful connection, the command shows an entry with the connection’s name and details. If the output is empty, the tunnel is not established.
